June colors · a design system

Parkette.

Meet Abuela — the face of the brand, recolored to the June palette. Sun-washed pastels on cream, cocoa line-work, and a pixel-flower wink.

PinkSky OrangeYellow Olive

01 — Brand character

Abuela, recolored

Every June color is pulled through her: cocoa hair & line, cream skin, olive dress, orange halo, pink lips. She leads first impressions — heroes, empty states, loaders, the app icon. Don't recolor, stretch, blur, or crop through her glasses.

The halo badge

An orange disc + cocoa ring turns her portrait into a sticker avatar for app icons, profile marks, and loaders. The same frame (.pk-halo) can wrap feature icons or teammate photos.

abuela.svg / .png
abuela-badge.png
favicon 128px

02 — Palette · June Colors

Cream, cocoa, and five pastels

Orange leads calls-to-action; the rest rotate freely. Cocoa #6B342A reads on every accent, so it's the only "dark" you need — no black anywhere.

Pink
her lips#F8B1B9
Sky
accent#9CCBED
Orange
her halo · CTA#F9A24A

accent#F4C816

Ink · cocoa · #6B342A
Ink muted · #936A4E

03 — Type

Fredoka + Nunito Sans

The wordmark can go multicolor for display moments — a nod to the reference lettering. Body text never does.

Hero · multicolorParkette.
H1 · Fredoka 600Come on in, mijo
H2 · Fredoka 600Thank you for playing
H3 · Fredoka 500A little bit of everything
Eyebrow · Nunito 700Let's connect
Body · Nunito 400Warm, plain, a little playful — like Abuela herself. The cream does half the work.

04 — Components

Peel-and-stick parts

Hover a button — it lifts toward you; press it — it sticks flat.

Buttons
Chips & flowers
PinkSkyOrangeYellowOlive
.pk-flower
Input

05 — Shape & motion

Circle for her, square for pixels

14
20
30
44
pill

Depth is a hard 4px 4px 0 cocoa offset — never a gradient or blur. Circle is Abuela's shape (halo, badge, glasses); crisp squares carry the pixel-flower and corner confetti.

06 — Guardrails

Do / Don't

Do
  • Put Abuela on first impressions.
  • Use cocoa as the only "dark."
  • Lead with orange; rotate the five pastels.
  • Sprinkle pixel-flowers as accents.
  • Frame avatars with the halo.
Don't
  • Reintroduce black or pure white.
  • Recolor, stretch, blur, or crop Abuela.
  • Add gradients or glows to fills.
  • Set long body text on olive un-bumped.
  • Turn the pixel-flower into wallpaper.
Parkette. · June Colors · brand character: Abuela
